# orm-public-current-user

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the currentUser query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.currentUser().execute()
```

## Examples

### Run currentUser

```typescript
const result = await db.query.currentUser().execute();
```
